arts.ttl: Barcelona edge Real Madrid in ET thriller
arts.sum: A Jules Koundé goal in the dying minutes of extra time handed Barcelona a dramatic 3-2 win over fierce rivals Real Madrid in an enthralling Copa del Rey final.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 3-2 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Catalan giants triumph in thrilling Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Barcelona win the Copa del Rey for the 32nd time in their history courtesy of a 3-2 victory over bitter rivals Real Madrid in Saturday night's El Clasico.

arts.ttl: Barcelona beats Real Madrid in extra time to win Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Barcelona beat Real Madrid 3-2 in extra time to claim a record-extending 32nd Copa del Rey title on Saturday and launch its bid for a treble. Pedri González scored from long range to give Barcelona the lead in the 28th minute at La Cartuja Stadium.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 3-2 Real Madrid: Kounde strikes late in extra time to take the spoils in El Clasico cup final
arts.sum: Kounde’s late effort capped a memorable Copa del Rey final

arts.ttl: Barcelona win Copa del Rey with dramatic victory over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona have won the 2024-25 Copa del Rey after securing a 3-2 victory over Real Madrid in the final at La Cartuja. Barcelona came out of the blocks flying, and they dominated the early stages. They came close to scoring on multiple occasions, but in the 28th minute, they did manage to break the deadlock […] The post Barcelona win Copa del Rey with dramatic victory over Real Madrid appeared first on Football España.
